report.summary: Cycle v8: No new commits since Mar 17 (7 days). Git locks still blocking pushes (P0). 662 uncommitted files (+4 since v7). All 6 API routes present with cache headers. 42 TS errors unchanged. Rate limiter and defi-yields fallback still unwired (40+ cycles).

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PUBLISHED SLUGS: 438 total in published-pages.ts (+4 since v7). ~331 have dedicated page.tsx files; remainder rely on dynamic [slug] routes.
PAGE.TSX FILES: 1,102 total page.tsx files in src/app — codebase is large and growing even without commits.
TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX-in-TS syntax). Unchanged across all cycles.
BUILD SAFETY: ignoreBuildErrors:true still active — build succeeds but masks type errors.
LIVE SITE: Egress blocked from sandbox — unable to verify HTTP 200s. No code changes since last verified cycle.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: 0 commits this cycle, no new breakage introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTES PRESENT: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields — all have route.ts files.
CACHE HEADERS: All 6 core routes contain Cache-Control/stale-while-revalidate headers. Plus cache-stats, health, news-rss (9 total).
RATE LIMITER: Still only wired to cache-stats and health routes. NOT wired to the 6 core public routes (40+ cycles unfixed).
DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Still 0 fallback data references in defi-yields/route.ts (40+ cycles unfixed).
LIVE API HEALTH: Cannot verify runtime from sandbox — egress blocked. No code changes since last healthy check.

sections.title: DevOps
items: PRODUCTION: Running commit e999560 (Day 62 publish), deployed Mar 17. No new deploys in 7 days.
GIT LOCKS [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 8 days old. All commits and pushes blocked. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 662 uncommitted files (+4 since v7). Drift continues to accumulate without ability to commit.
VERCEL: Project prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 configured. Cannot verify panel status from sandbox.
ignoreBuildErrors:true remains active in next.config.ts — production builds pass despite 42 TS errors.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys. Development stalled by git locks.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git lock files — 8 days old. Single command fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes (40+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: defi-yields missing fallback data (40+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts need cleanup.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~107 published slugs without dedicated page.tsx files.
DELTA vs v7: +4 uncommitted files (658 → 662), +4 published slugs (434 → 438), git locks now 8 days old.
RECOMMENDATION: Resolve git locks immediately, then batch-commit the 662 pending files before further drift accumulates.
